# Feature implementation prompt

Implement the requested feature in this Python FastAPI service.

## Expectations

- Confirm the affected API, configuration, telemetry, and test surfaces.
- Keep code typed and compatible with strict mypy settings.
- Add or update unit and integration tests.
- Update README or operational documentation when behavior changes.
- Validate with `python -m ruff check .`, `python -m mypy`, and `python -m pytest`.
